overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a soldier in winter camouflage walking through a vast snowy mountain valley. The character approaches and passes a small abandoned settlement before continuing along a winding trail surrounded by snow-covered peaks under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow valley approaching distant settlement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward a distant abandoned settlement nestled against the mountain slope

entered.detail: large snow-covered mountain range forming the valley walls with rocky peaks visible
cluster of small wooden buildings partially buried in snow at the base of the mountain
deep snow covering the valley floor with footprints trailing behind the character

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vast snowy mountain valley under a clear blue sky. The player character walks through deep snow toward an abandoned settlement visible in the distance to the left, with massive snow-covered peaks rising in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: passing abandoned settlement with visible trail

events.description: character turns slightly left to follow the winding trail past the abandoned buildings

agents.ego_description: passing the abandoned settlement and following the snow-covered trail as it curves through the mountain valley

entered.detail: winding dirt path partially cleared of snow showing brown earth beneath
weathered wooden fence posts near the abandoned buildings

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes the abandoned settlement, revealing a winding trail through the snow. The camera follows the path as it curves left, with the settlement falling behind and the mountain range shifting to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain trail through open valley

events.description: character continues along the curving trail with camera panning to follow the path direction

agents.ego_description: trekking along the winding snowy path deeper into the mountain valley, navigating the gentle curves of the trail

entered.detail: clumps of dry yellow-brown vegetation poking through the snow on the right side of the trail
opening of the valley ahead with snow-covered peaks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the winding trail deeper into the mountain valley. Dry bushes appear scattered on the right side of the path, and the valley opens ahead with snow-covered peaks surrounding the area. The trail curves gently as the character progresses through the pristine winter landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast snowy valley that transitions from an approach toward a remote settlement into a journey deeper into the mountain wilderness. It begins with the character trekking through deep snow under a clear blue sky, moving toward an abandoned settlement nestled against a backdrop of massive peaks. As the character passes the settlement, the camera follows a winding trail that curves left, leaving the buildings behind while the mountain range shifts toward the edge of the frame. The scene then expands as the path leads further into the valley, where scattered dry bushes appear along the right side of the trail. Finally, the camera continues along the gentle curve of the path, progressing through the pristine winter landscape toward the surrounding snow-covered summits.
